summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience deploying machine learning and LLM-powered systems for real-world use cases. Shipped a real-time AI interview platform using Anthropic Claude, a RAG developer tool backed by OpenAI and Pinecone, and a computer vision pipeline on Kubernetes that improved accuracy by 30%. Comfortable working across the full deployment stack from model development to API integration to cloud infrastructure, and experienced communicating technical results to non-technical audiences.

skills.languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Agentic Workflows, NLP, Computer Vision, Prompt Engineering, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), FastAPI, Express.js, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
